title: CTOV - Croptopia compat
description: Compatibility datapack for croptopia mod and CTOV
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Croptopia. You will find a croptopia crop farm and orchards in the village centre. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric. 

**Croptopia mod**

Croptopia mod can be obtained from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia).

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village).
